reasoning: Your main limiter is poor lactate clearance, highlighted by a 9.3% decline from 5-min to 20-min output versus the standard 5-8% for trained cyclists. In your last ride, you averaged 152.6W, indicating room to grow your intensity. Tackling this directly will help you maintain the 220-235W average we are targeting for the Alpine Loop’s main climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of (10 min @ 209-218W, 5 min @ 242-256W), 5 min easy between

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
